message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.
I can’t quote terms here. To continue assessment, confirm your full name or the last 2 digits of your phone number.
Karan Mehta. Please share the exact closure amount and the deadline by which I need to pay.
Verified. Masked account ****8824. Current amount due is 12,921. Before handoff, can you make any payment within 30 days?

I can make a payment within 30 days, but I need the exact closure amount and whether that would settle the account in full. If there’s any discount for paying sooner, tell me the deadline and total due.
Verified. Masked account ****8824. Current amount due is 12,921. Nira policy does not allow me to quote a settlement amount or deadline here. You said you can pay within 30 days; that is recorded.

message_text: If you can’t quote a settlement amount or deadline, then please give me the exact next step and when I should expect a concrete offer. I’m ready to close this, but not on vague terms.

Exact next step: choose one approved option now.

1) Reduced closure: $11,370.48 due by 2026-04-25, one payment.
2) Structured plan: up to 2 payments, first due by 2026-04-21 and final due by 2026-05-18.

If you want a concrete offer, pick one option and give the payment amount/date you can meet within those limits.

I can do the reduced closure option if that’s the best you can offer, but I need the exact total and confirmation that it settles the account in full. If I pay by 2026-04-25, is there anything else due after that?
Reduced closure is $11,370.48 due by 2026-04-25, one payment. If paid by that date, the account is settled in full and nothing else is due after that payment clears.
That works for me. I’ll pay the $11,370.48 in one payment by 2026-04-25, and I understand that settles the account in full.
Accepted. Reduced closure is $11,370.48 due by 2026-04-25 in one payment. If that payment clears by the deadline, the account is settled in full and no further balance remains due.
